title: Add telemetry and calibration loop for cost estimation
summary: Replay a task that extends durable cost artifacts and introduces a calibration loop using repo-local telemetry.
expected_evidence: cost telemetry persists in durable artifacts
calibration reads historical data without external infrastructure
documentation explains operator usage and limits
curator_notes: Selected because it is a strong example of repo-local telemetry work that future evals can compare on both correctness and operational simplicity.
